items.title: Ask HN: What are the most joyful AI projects you've seen?
items.summary:
A lot of AI work I see is about automation, agents, productivity.
Useful, but not exactly joyful. What AI projects have you built, used, or seen that felt genuinely fun, playful, weird, beautiful, or surprising? Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48070363 Points: 4 # Comments: 2
